title: ipomopsis congesta var. frutescens
intro: Ipomopsis congesta var. frutescens, also known as Skyrocket, is a perennial wildflower native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Skyrocket can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in natural remedies for its potential therapeutic effects.
